title: Migipaws Interactive Cat Ball Toy Set, Automatic Rolling Ball hidden in Mysti-Pouch, Fluffy Tail, Small Mouse as Accessory, Fun Tracker Cat Toys for Bored Indoor Cats
features: 【Curiosity-Igniting & Inspire Natural Instincts】Cats are naturally drawn to small, fast-moving objects hidden beneath fabric. The Migipaws blanket ball toy mimics this prey-hunting scenario perfectly. The unpredictable motion and mysterious flashing lights trigger your cat’s natural curiosity and hunting instincts—encouraging them to pounce, paw, press, and "hunt" until they believe they’ve conquered the elusive creature inside.

【Creative Designs for Active Kittens】The pouch’s semi-transparent design lets the ball flicker in and out of sight as it rolls inside, making it easy for your cat to spot and chase—even in low light. The sturdy wire frame ensures the pouch holds its round shape and doesn’t collapse during play, maintaining a consistent, tension-filled “hunting ground” for extended engagement.

【2-in-1 Interactive Kitten Toy】This enrichment cat toy includes four play modes:Use the glowing rolling ball inside the MystiChaser pouch for hide-and-chase fun.Attach the fluffy tail or small mouse accessory for lifelike movement.Place the ball in a paper bag or cardboard box to create new textures and hunting challenges.Let cats chase the glowing ball solo on open floors.

【Stimulate Physical and Mental Exercise】Similar to a cat version of soccer, this toy promotes healthy movement and agility. The touch-activated glowing ball moves irregularly and unpredictably to keep indoor cats engaged physically and mentally.

【Durable and Rechargeable】Made from claw-resistant yet soft nylon, the pouch is lightweight and long-lasting. The ball is USB-C rechargeable and includes a built-in battery—no need for replacements. Safe for all ages, this automatic toy is suitable for playful kittens and curious senior cats alike.

【Smart Cat Toy with Endless Fun】With four color options and multiple play styles, the Migipaws Interactive Cat Ball Toy Set offers exceptional value and endless entertainment. It’s the perfect toy to satisfy your cat’s curiosity, encourage exercise, and bring joy to their indoor environment—day or night.
By the way, the style and colour of the free mouse plush accessories are random. You meet any problem welcome to contact us, we provide quality after-sales service!
